title: arthratherum capense
intro: Arthratherum capense, also known as Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to southern Africa that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. The medicinal properties of Arthratherum capense are attributed to its iridoid glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving effects. The health benefits of the plant include relief from arthritis, muscle and joint pain, as well as digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Arthratherum capense can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
